executiveSummary: This complaint details systematic violations of the Protection of Personal Information Act committed through unauthorized access to personal data, identity fraud, and misuse of personal information for financial crimes.

complainants.names: Daniel James Faucitt and Jacqueline Faucitt
complainants.capacity: Data Subjects whose personal information was unlawfully processed

respondents.name: Rynette Farrar
respondents.violations: Unauthorized access to personal data, identity fraud, misuse of banking credentials.

respondents.name: Peter Andrew Faucitt
respondents.violations: Authorized or permitted unauthorized access to personal data systems.

violations.violation: Processed personal info without consent or legitimate purpose
violations.evidence: Stolen card details, ABSA account openings

dataSubjects.name: Daniel James Faucitt
dataSubjects.dataCompromised: Banking credentials, ID number, card details
dataSubjects.impact: 8 unauthorized accounts opened; financial loss exceeding R500,000

dataSubjects.name: Jacqueline Faucitt
dataSubjects.impact: Company access revoked; ongoing financial harm

reliefSought: Issue an enforcement notice under s95 of POPIA.
Impose an administrative fine under s107.
Order the responsible party to notify all affected data subjects.
Refer the matter to SAPS for criminal prosecution under s107(1).

annexures.description: System Access Logs and SF10 Analysis
